channel.title: Copilot on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Copilot on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily

item.title: Using Github Copilot from Azure Subscription
item.description:
Hello,I have a question on how GitHub Copilot can be accessed and managed through an Azure subscription. If I am getting a Github Copilot license, how is my azure subscription getting linked to the billing and licensing?Specifically, I would like clarification on how the Azure subscription is linked to GitHub Copilot billing and licensing. 

🔗 Read the full article

Curated by Cyril Bou-Harb — Solution Engineer, Cloud & AI at Microsoft. Views are my own.

item.title: Official Microsoft Power Platform documentation - Power Platform
item.description:
…xtend and develop Learn about developing apps and services in Power Platform using code Architecture Center Guidance for architecting solutions with Power Platform and Copilot Studio using established patterns and best practices Well-Architected Guiding principles, strategies, and tools to help make informed decisions about the design,.
